seoDescription: GenFix supports heavy industry, infrastructure, and commercial facilities with dependable power solutions.

hero.heading: About GenFix
hero.body: GenFix helps construction, infrastructure, and industrial operators keep critical sites powered with practical diesel generator expertise, responsive support, and safety-first delivery.

sections.title: Who We Are
sections.body: We are a field-led power team focused on reliable 5-20 kVA diesel generator solutions, from initial planning through long-term operational support.

cards.title: Industrial Uptime Focus
cards.description: Every recommendation is built around uptime risk, site constraints, and practical maintenance realities.

cards.title: Safety And Compliance Mindset
cards.description: We align projects to commissioning, handover, and operational checks that reduce avoidable failures.

cards.title: End-To-End Delivery
cards.description: From short-term rental through permanent deployment, GenFix supports the full power lifecycle.

sections.title: What Clients Can Expect
sections.body: Clients choose GenFix for direct technical communication, disciplined execution, and accountable after-sales support.

cards.title: Straightforward Technical Advice
cards.description: Load assessments and power plans are explained clearly so teams can make decisions fast.

cards.title: Reliable Mobilisation
cards.description: Coordinated logistics, setup, and commissioning reduce startup delays on active sites.

cards.title: Long-Term Partnership
cards.description: Service reviews and performance reporting support continuous improvement over time.
